verbGlossary.DETAILED IN: {source} geometry, dimensions, and assembly are fully described in {target}
verbGlossary.SHOWN ON: {source} routing, layout, or location is depicted on {target}
verbGlossary.SPECIFIED IN: {source} material, performance, and installation requirements are defined in {target}
verbGlossary.CLARIFIED BY: Ambiguity about {target}'s design intent is resolved through an RFI
verbGlossary.RESOLVED BY: A design question about {target} is formally answered in the RFI response
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED FOR: {source} {target}, shop drawings, or samples are submitted for architect/engineer approval
verbGlossary.FABRICATED FROM: {source} is manufactured or fabricated using {target} dimensions and details
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED IN: {source} manufacturer data, test reports, or certifications are {target}ed in a product data submittal
verbGlossary.SAMPLED FOR: {source}of {target} material or finish is submitted for approval
verbGlossary.APPROVED VIA: {source} {target} is formally reviewed and accepted through a submittal response
verbGlossary.MODIFIED BY: {source} requirements are changed through an addendum issued during bidding or construction
verbGlossary.SUPPLEMENTED BY: {source} design is further clarified or revised by an architect's supplemental instruction or bulletin
verbGlossary.DIRECTED BY: Field work on {target} is instructed through a site instruction or field directive
verbGlossary.RECORDED IN: {source} installation progress or field conditions are noted in {target} entry
verbGlossary.LOGGED IN: {source} work activity, crew, and conditions are {target}ed in a daily report
verbGlossary.PHOTOGRAPHED IN: {source} condition, progress, or concealed work is visually {target}ed in a photo
verbGlossary.PRICED VIA: {source} scope is priced by subcontractors through a request for proposal or pricing request
verbGlossary.CHANGED BY: {source} scope or design is formally changed through a construction change {target}
verbGlossary.DISCUSSED IN: {source} status, issues, or coordination is addressed in {target}
verbGlossary.DELAYED PER: {source} installation or delivery delay is formally communicated via {target} of delay
verbGlossary.PERMITTED BY: {source} work requires and is authorized through a building permit or permit application
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} installation is regulated by an environmental compliance {target}
verbGlossary.DEFICIENCIES IN: {source} installation deficiencies are itemized on the punch list
verbGlossary.RECORDED AS-BUILT IN: {source} final installed location, routing, or configuration is {target}ed in as-built records
verbGlossary.MAINTAINED PER: {source} long-term operation and maintenance procedures are {target}ed in an O&M manual
verbGlossary.WARRANTED IN: {source} warranty terms, duration, and coverage are {target}ed in warranty records
verbGlossary.UPDATED BY: {source} design or layout is revised through a plan revision {target}
verbGlossary.TRANSMITTED VIA: {source} {target}s (shop drawings, submittals, data) are formally sent via a transmittal
verbGlossary.TRACKED IN: {source} commissioning or completion tasks are organized in {target}
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED VIA: A specific task related to {target} is created and assigned as an action plan line item
verbGlossary.CAPTURED IN: {source} installation process or critical activity is {target}ed on video
